caption: A man wearing a grey suit jacket over a dark shirt and a lanyard stands on a stage in front of a large projection screen. The screen displays the title "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING" and the subtitle "HORIZONTALLY SCALABLE DATA PIPELINES WITH AIRFLOW," along with the name "Alejandro Saucedo" and social media handles "@AxSaucedo" and "in/axsaucedo." At the bottom of the screen, the "europython" logo appears next to the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018." As the scene progresses, the man gestures with his hands while speaking, moving from a position with both hands raised to a more centered stance. He shifts his gaze and posture slightly, looking toward the audience and then back toward the screen. The backdrop of the presentation slide features a dark blue geometric network pattern, and the lighting on the stage remains constant throughout the sequence.
